agents.name: Sentiment Sniper
agents.description: Scans Twitter/X, Reddit, and financial news for real-time sentiment shifts on any asset. Detects narrative changes before price moves.
agents.strategy: NLP-based sentiment scoring with engagement-weighted signals. Cross-references social velocity with price action.

agents.name: Volatility Screener
agents.description: Discovers assets with extreme price movements across 1D, 7D, and 30D windows. Finds the movers before the crowd.
agents.strategy: Multi-timeframe volatility regime detection using ATR, Bollinger bandwidth, and historical percentile ranking.

agents.name: Macro Radar
agents.description: Monitors central bank communications, economic data releases, and geopolitical events. Translates macro signals into actionable portfolio tilts.
agents.strategy: Event-driven macro scoring with Fed sentiment analysis, yield curve monitoring, and cross-asset correlation tracking.

agents.name: Momentum Hunter
agents.description: Identifies assets with strong trend momentum using dual-momentum and relative strength strategies. Rides winners, cuts losers.
agents.strategy: Dual momentum (absolute + relative) with ADX trend confirmation and EMA crossover validation.

agents.name: DeFi Scout
agents.description: Tracks DeFi protocols for yield opportunities, TVL shifts, and token sentiment. Finds alpha in decentralized markets.
agents.strategy: TVL momentum analysis, yield curve optimization across protocols, and social signal cross-referencing.

agents.name: Risk Guardian
agents.description: Monitors portfolio exposure, correlation risk, and drawdown limits. Protects capital with real-time risk management.
agents.strategy: VaR calculation, correlation matrix monitoring, max drawdown alerts, and dynamic position sizing recommendations.
